explanation: The property states that a control-traffic message must only be sent after both the MPR Selector Set and Duplicate Set components have been queried. This is captured by stating that if a control-traffic message is sent (bool_exp3), then it must have been preceded by the querying of the MPR Selector Set (bool_exp4) followed by the querying of the Duplicate Set (bool_exp5). The 'Globally' scope implies that this condition applies throughout the system's operation, aligning with 'This property holds for every DM_i'.
decision2: if bool_exp3 holds, then it must have been the case that bool_exp4 and afterwards bool_exp5 have occurred before bool_exp3 holds
decision1_substring: This property holds for every DM_i
decision2_substring: the control-traffic message that must be sent only after querying the MPR Selector Set and Duplicate Set components
output_structured_natural_language: Globally, if controltraffic_msg_sent_local_node_to_dmi holds, then it must have been the case that local_node_queried_mpr_selector_set and afterwards local_node_queried_duplicate_set have occurred before controltraffic_msg_sent_local_node_to_dmi holds
